utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 7 items required in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. All 7 appear in the final package. Now check if each is fully specified: 
- destination: Provided (Prague, Czech Republic) – sufficient.
- travel_dates: Provided (July 1-5, 2024) – specific dates – sufficient.
- transportation: Requires flight details with costs. Provided: route (Paris to Prague), class, airline type (Budget Airlines), total cost and per-passenger breakdown. Lacks exact flight numbers/times but the format only asks for flight details with costs, which is satisfied.
- accommodation: Requires hotel selection with costs. Provided: hotel name, total cost, per-night rate, nights, room type suitability – sufficient.
- activities: Selected activities with costs. Provided: three activities with dates and costs – sufficient.
- additional_services: Any extra services with costs. Provided: restaurant reservations with total cost and specific meals/dates – sufficient.
- total_budget: Complete cost breakdown. Provided: line items with totals and remaining budget – sufficient.
Therefore, all 7/7 items are included and sufficiently specified per the required format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Identify each item from the final package and match it to the exact item name in the ground-truth ratings. Each of these has a corresponding entry with a numeric rating in the ground-truth list.
